overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from neon-lit streets into a parking garage, narrow alley, and finally an industrial courtyard with NPCs. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-fidelity ray-traced graphics featuring yellow neon signs against dark atmospheric fog.

segments.scene_description: Emerging into an industrial courtyard with overhead metal walkways and scattered debris. Several NPCs are present, with one character kneeling over another on the ground near industrial barrels while others stand guard nearby. The area is dimly lit with mixed lighting from overhead fixtures and distant neon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-lit city intersection into the claustrophobic depths of an industrial courtyard. It begins by gliding through a foggy intersection where wet asphalt reflects the glow of distant buildings, moving along a sidewalk lined with palm trees and a massive, glowing Wet Dream billboard. As the camera leaves the open street, the environment shifts into a dimly lit parking garage beneath an overpass, marked by a large illuminated sign that shelters the view from the haze. The path then narrows into a tight alleyway flanked by metal scaffolding and graffiti-covered walls before finally emerging into an industrial courtyard. This final space opens up to reveal overhead metal walkways and a group of NPCs gathered around industrial barrels, with one figure kneeling over another under the mixed glow of overhead fixtures and distant neon.
